prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-AOFTSATWWH-11-BLCK Product Type: AXE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Universal Full Tang Spiked Axe Tomahawk Wooden Handle Ultra Lightweight Tactical Description: This lightweight hatchet is easy to carry along almost anywhere. Exceptional for light jobs, it's great for when you need something portable that won't add too much weight. It's powerful and durable, yet easy to carry around and use.

The axe is sleek with cutouts in the handle to reduce the weight further. This 11" hatchet sports a 3 1/2" blade, a pick, and a steel spike on the bottom of the handle.

Not recommended for throwing. Search Terms: throwing hatchet for men decorative blades throwing ax wrapped blade stainless steel tomahawk camping hatchet Features: - Full Tang 1045 Surgical Steel Construction - Hardwood Handle Overlay - 3.5 inch blade; 11 inches overall - Nylon Scabbard with belt loop - Exposed steel Spike on the knob of the handle === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 11in Black Spiked Axe Tomahawk

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 11-in Spiked Tactical Tomahawk Axe

anthropic.title_differentiation: Full Tang Steel Construction, 35In Blade, Lightweight Tactical Design, Spike And Pick, Nylon Scabbard Included

openai.title_differentiation: Full Tang 1045 Surgical Steel, Hardwood Handle Overlay, 35" Blade, Nylon Scabbard, Exposed Steel Spike
